title: ZkPassportBundle
description: The verifiable zkPassport artifact embedded inside DelegationToken.zkpassport_proof (canonical-JSON-then-base64). It is exactly what the zkpassport-bridge needs to re-run @zkpassport/sdk verify(): the UltraHonk proofs, the original query (which carries the agent_key bind under query.bind.custom_data), the disclosed-attribute QueryResult, and the scope. The shapes of `proofs`, `query`, and `queryResult` are defined by @zkpassport/sdk and treated as opaque pass-through by the broker. See packages/zkpassport-bridge and ARCHITECTURE.md §8.5.

proofs.description: Array of @zkpassport/sdk ProofResult objects (UltraHonk proofs) produced by the phone.

query.description: The original @zkpassport/sdk Query sent to the phone. Carries the disclosure constraints and the agent_key bind at query.bind.custom_data. Passed back into verify() so a tampered query or a proof bound to a different agent_key fails.

queryResult.description: The @zkpassport/sdk QueryResult of disclosed attributes (e.g. age.gte.result, nationality.in.result). Checked against the proof's public inputs during verify().

scope.description: zkPassport request scope (e.g. 'v1'). Combined with the bridge domain to derive the nullifier.
